degraded_reason: Single ready bead implemented directly by parent; independent Codex reviewer subagents used for review gate.
review_blocker_summary: Both initial reviewers requested preserving the public operation label when Flush or Shutdown drains fail.
Updated drain sends to pass through export, flush, or shutdown instead of hardcoding export.
A focused re-review then requested the same operation-label fix for pending redaction failures during Flush or Shutdown.
Updated pending payload preparation to use the public drain operation for redaction errors and added a regression using private redaction options for testability.
Focused re-reviews approved all operation-label fixes with no remaining blocking findings.
